message:
fix(time): join fallback timer threads instead of dropping in Sleep reset and cancel

Replace drop(handle) with let _ = handle.join() in two locations within
Sleep's internal reset and cancellation paths. Dropping a JoinHandle
detaches the thread, which can leave fallback timer threads running
after the Sleep future is cancelled or reset. Joining ensures the
thread has actually exited before proceeding, preventing resource
leaks in long-running runtimes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
